zh.lifeSummary: 當Philip de Kyme 1st Baron Kyme於大約1245年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾素斯 吉時，他的父親William de Kyme21歲，母親Lucy de Ros17歲。他於大約1270年與Joan le Bigod結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1323年4月2日在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾吉享年79歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾諾斯 吉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Philip de Kyme 1st Baron Kyme于大约1245年出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾素斯 吉时，他的父亲William de Kyme21岁，母亲Lucy de Ros17岁。他于大约1270年与Joan le Bigod结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1323年4月2日在英国英格兰林可爾史爾吉享年79岁，埋葬在英国英格兰林可爾史爾諾斯 吉。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Kyme
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from North or South Kyme (Lincs).

nameMeanings.name: Philip
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Greek name Philippos, meaning ‘lover of horses’, from philein ‘to love’ + hippos ‘horse’. This was popular in the classical period and since. It was the name of the father of Alexander the Great . It was also the name of one of Christ's apostles, of a deacon ordained by the apostles after the death of Christ, and of several other early saints. See also Philippa .

en.lifeSummary: When Philip de Kyme 1st Baron Kyme was born about 1245, in South Kyme, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William de Kyme, was 21 and his mother, Lucy de Ros, was 17. He married Joan le Bigod about 1270. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 2 April 1323, in Kyme, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 79, and was buried in North Kyme, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Philip de Kyme 1st Baron Kyme est né environ 1245, à South Kyme, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Kyme, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Lucy de Ros, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Joan le Bigod environ 1270. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 2 avril 1323, à Kyme, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 79 ans, et a été enterré à North Kyme, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Kyme Priory, North Kyme, Lincolnshire, E: North Kyme, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Philip de Kyme 1st Baron Kyme um 1245 in South Kyme, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Kyme 21 und seine Mutter Lucy de Ros 17. Er hat um 1270 Joan le Bigod geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 2. April 1323 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Kyme, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in North Kyme, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Philip de Kyme 1st Baron Kyme è nato il circa 1245 nel South Kyme, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William de Kyme, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Lucy de Ros, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Joan le Bigod circa 1270. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 2 aprile 1323, nel Kyme, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 79 anni, e fu sepolto a North Kyme, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Philip de Kyme 1st Baron Kymeが約1245年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアソウス クイメで生まれた時，父William de Kymeは21歳，母Lucy de Rosは17歳であった。約1270年にJoan le Bigodと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1323年4月2日にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアクイメで79歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアノース クイメにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Philip de Kyme 1st Baron Kyme(이)가 대략 1245년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 소우스 키에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Kyme(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Lucy de Ros(은)는 17세였다. 그는 대략 1270년 Joan le Bigod(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1323년 4월 2일 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 키에서 79세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 노르스 키에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Philip de Kyme 1st Baron Kyme nasceu aproximadamente 1245, em South Kyme, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Kyme, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Lucy de Ros, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan le Bigod aproximadamente 1270. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 2 de abril de 1323, em Kyme, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 79 anos, e foi sepultado em North Kyme, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Philip de Kyme 1st Baron Kyme родился около 1245 г. в местности соут ким, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Kyme было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Lucy de Ros, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan le Bigod около 1270 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 2 апреля 1323 г. в местности ким, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 79 лет и был похоронен в местности норт ким, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Joan le Bigod aproximadamente 1270. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 2 de abril de 1323, en Kyme, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 79 años, y fue sepultado en North Kyme, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
